description: Use this API to read an extended raw data file and add all the data specified to the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = readrawx(sfile, domains, mode)

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Filename of the extended power flow raw data file. (input).

parameters.name: domains
parameters.description: Comma separated string of rawx domains to read. (input; all domains by default).

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Mode to operate in. (input; new by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
